name: rapitas
description: 階層型タスク管理システム

scripts.dev:frontend: cd rapitas-frontend && cross-env pnpm run dev
scripts.tauri: cd rapitas-desktop && pnpm run tauri dev
scripts.tauri:build: cd rapitas-desktop && pnpm run tauri build
scripts.build:web: node scripts/switch-to-postgres.cjs && cd rapitas-frontend && pnpm run build
scripts.install:all: cd rapitas-backend && bun install && cd ../rapitas-frontend && pnpm install && cd ../rapitas-desktop && pnpm install
scripts.prisma:migrate: cd rapitas-backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:push: cd rapitas-backend && npx prisma db push
